qcSource: Author Test Cases - FIB test cases.pdf
note: Standard FIB (no media). Authoring-DOM behaviour automated; Preview/Reader runtime, save+refresh persistence, file-picker uploads, undo/redo, keyboard/screen-reader a11y, and runtime caps/validation are deferred.
